compartment.title: Implement Katanime provider Phase 1 (data only)
compartment.p1:
Mapped Katanime endpoints to app data: Home (`/animes`), Search (`/buscar`), Details (`/slug` + POST pagination for episodes), and Episodes. U: podriamos dejar el tema de reproduccion una vez hayamos poblado la app no? rellenar lo que tenemos hasta ahora Proposed a Phase 1 plan to implement `getHomeData`, `search`, `getDetails`, and `getSuggestions` using `node-html-parser`, while postponing `getEpisodeServers` and `resolveStreamUrl` as stubs. U: user agent debe ser dinamico, tomar el del host, por ejemplo, el del celular donde se ejecute, nada de ua hardcoded, lo que vamos a posponer son los extractores, unicamente eso Refined the plan to use a dynamic User-Agent by modifying `SessionManager.ts` to resolve the `waitForCookies()` promise when `session.userAgent` is available from the WebView bootstrap, instead of waiting for cookies.
Implemented the following: - Created `src/lib/infrastructure/providers/KatanimeProvider.ts` using `node-html-parser`. - Added `KATANIME_CONFIG` to `src/lib/config/providerConfigs.ts` with `requiresSession: false`. - Updated `src/lib/di.ts` to instantiate `KatanimeProvider`. - Updated `src/lib/core/infrastructure.ts` to skip `refreshSession` for sessionless providers. - Updated `src/lib/infrastructure/services/SessionManager.ts` to resolve on `userAgent`. Project typecheck and lint pass clean.
compartment.p2: Implemented Katanime provider for data (Home, Search, Details) using `node-html-parser` and dynamic UA from `SessionManager`. Playback and extractors postponed to Phase 2. `KATANIME_CONFIG` added; DI and infrastructure updated to support sessionless provider.
compartment.p3: Katanime provider implemented for data retrieval; uses dynamic UA; playback/extractors stubs.
compartment.p4: KatanimeProvider; node-html-parser; dynamic userAgent; Phase 1 (data only)

facts.CONFIG_VALUES: * Katanime baseUrl: https://katanime.net * Katanime requiresSession: false * SessionManager.waitForCookies() resolves on session.userAgent availability.

output.user_observations: * User prefers phased development (data before playback/extractors). * User mandates using native/host values (e.g., dynamic User-Agent) over hardcoded strings.
